hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --inputFiles
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the input files

options.name: --inputDirectory
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the input directory

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the output directory

options.name: --outputFiles
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the output files

options.name: --pattern
options.description: The search string to match against the names of files in the input directory [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --format
options.description: The compression file format (br, gz, zlib, def) [default: br]

options.name: --level
options.description: The compression level (Optimal, Fastest, NoCompression, SmallestSize) [default: SmallestSize]

options.name: --threads
options.description: The number of parallel job threads [default: 1]

options.name: --recursive
options.description: Recurse into subdirectories of input directory search [default: True]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Set verbosity level to quiet [default: False]
